sessionStart.command: if [ -z "${WAL_URL:-}" ]; then printf '{"continue":true}\n'; exit 0; fi; curl -sS -m 3 -X POST -H 'content-type: application/json' -d "{\"agent\":\"${AGENT_ID:-unknown}\",\"event\":\"cursor_session_start\",\"summary\":\"session started\"}" "${WAL_URL}/wal/append" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; printf '{"continue":true}\n'

stop.command: if [ -z "${WAL_URL:-}" ]; then printf '{"continue":true}\n'; exit 0; fi; curl -sS -m 3 -X POST -H 'content-type: application/json' -d "{\"agent\":\"${AGENT_ID:-unknown}\",\"event\":\"cursor_session_stop\",\"summary\":\"session stopped\"}" "${WAL_URL}/wal/append" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; printf '{"continue":true}\n'
